name: Testproject
prompt:
Create a premium, dark-themed investor landing page that would impress sophisticated venture capital investors.

Key priorities:
- Make financial metrics and traction data the visual centerpiece with animated counters
- Use elegant GSAP scroll animations throughout - every section should animate into view
- Hero section should be particularly striking with gradient text and staggered reveals
- Include glassmorphism-styled cards for team members and features
- Add a prominent "Schedule a Call" floating CTA button
- Ensure the page feels like a premium, institutional-grade investment presentation
- Use subtle particle or grid background effects for depth
- Make sure all numbers/metrics have counting animations when scrolled into view
errorMessage: Could not resolve authentication method. Expected either apiKey or authToken to be set. Or for one of the "X-Api-Key" or "Authorization" headers to be explicitly omitted
